# WhatsApp Jobs

> WhatsApp Jobs is an Australia-wide service for finding construction, labour hire, tradie, hospitality, warehouse, and farm work through WhatsApp job groups — no extra app. Powered by Yakka.

## What is WhatsApp Jobs?

WhatsApp Jobs helps workers in Australia find real shifts posted in WhatsApp groups they already use. Message +61 416 184 624 or visit https://whatsappjobs.com.au with your trade and location; the team connects you to active WhatsApp job groups near you. Hirers with labour WhatsApp groups can also use the service to reach workers when they are short-handed.

## Who it is for

- Workers looking for construction, labouring, tradie, hospitality, warehouse, or farm jobs in Australia
- Builders and site managers who hire through WhatsApp labour groups
- Anyone searching for "WhatsApp jobs", "WhatsApp jobs Australia", or "WhatsApp group for work"

## How to start

1. Open https://whatsappjobs.com.au/
2. Tap "Find work on WhatsApp"
3. Send your trade, suburb or city, and availability

## FAQ highlights

- Free for workers — uses the WhatsApp app you already have
- Jobs are posted when hirers need someone, often at short notice
- After a shift, many workers use Yakka (https://yakkalabour.com.au/) for timesheets and invoicing

## Contact

- Site: https://whatsappjobs.com.au
- Email: hello@whatsappjobs.com.au
- WhatsApp: +61 416 184 624

## Powered by Yakka

- Labour hire platform: https://yakkalabour.com.au/
